.The contribution of fission neutrons was calculated
on the assumption of a Maxwellian shape for the
fission spectrum, normalized to the part of the
fission spectrum above the elastic peak.
.The cross sections were corrected for finite sample
size, beam attenuation and multiple scattering within
the sample using the Monte Carlo program 'MAGGIE',
rept. No 087, NEA computer progr.library, ISPRA).
The errors are due to counting statistics,
uncertainties in the reference N-P scattering cross-
section and detector efficiencies, and include errors
inherent in the Monte Carlo method.
